title: Tokenized stock transfers surge 105% in a month to $8.4B
summary: Industry data shows trading activity and market value accelerating as crypto companies and traditional financial institutions expand tokenized equity initiatives.

title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
summary: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

title: Emerging Currencies Slide as US Forces Launch New Iran Strikes
summary: Most emerging-market currencies weakened on Wednesday as the US launched a new wave of strikes against Iran after threatening to reimpose an oil embargo, renewing fears of a prolonged conflict and bolstering oil prices.

title: Media M&A in Focus at Sun Valley
summary:
Bloomberg's Michelle Davis joins Dani Burger on "Bloomberg Deals" to discuss what's top of mind in media M&A as moguls gather in Sun Valley for Allen & Co.'s annual conference.

title: CFTC Chair Says Clarity Act Is ‘So Close’ As August Deadline Nears
summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

CFTC Chair Says Clarity Act Is ‘So Close’ As August Deadline Nears
CFTC Chairman Michael Selig urged Congress to pass the Clarity Act before the August recess, saying the crypto market-structure bill is "so close" despite ongoing disputes over ethics and stablecoin provisions.

title: Paradigm Raises $1.2 Billion Fund as Crypto VC Pushes Further Into AI
summary: The investment firm said its fourth fund will back AI, robotics, and crypto startups as it broadens beyond digital assets.

title: Bitcoin Stalls as Ethereum Flashes Worst Weekly Signal in Years: Analysis
summary: Bitcoin is looking slightly more optimistic but failed the breakout everyone was watching. Meanwhile, ETH just printed a weekly death cross for the first time in years.

title: Cash App owner Block to pay $45 million after states say it made false security promises
summary: Block Inc. has agreed to pay $45 million to settle allegations brought by regulators in nearly every U.S. state.

title: Paradigm raises $1.2 billion fourth fund, expanding beyond crypto into AI and robotics
summary: Crypto venture firm Paradigm has raised its fourth fund, a $1.2 billion vehicle that will invest in crypto, AI, robotics, and other startups.

title: US says it has launched new strikes on Iran
summary: Attacks come after Donald Trump told a Nato summit the ceasefire with Tehran is “over”

title: Why the US and Iran are stuck in a cycle of tit-for-tat strikes
summary: Trump’s push to get ships moving through the Strait of Hormuz keeps colliding with Tehran’s resistance to cede control
